articles.title: Iran says response to U.S. attack in Strait of Hormuz will be swift and decisive: Iranian media
articles.description: CNBC's Eamon Javers reports on Iran's response to the U.S. attack in the Strait of Hormuz, according to Iranian media. Iran’s military said American forces attacked Sirik Island, and vowed to respond in a “swift and decisive manner.” The U.S. military struck Iran on Friday after President Donald Trump accused the Islamic Republic of violating a ceasefire by launching drone attacks at ships in the Strait of Hormuz.

articles.title: How Z.AI is closing in on America's AI frontier
articles.description: Chinese AI company Zhipu's GLM 5.2 is closing the gap with American frontier models on key agentic benchmarks — and it's free, open-source and adopting faster than DeepSeek. CNBC's Deirdre Bosa explores what that means for enterprises and vertical AI. She speaks with Box CEO Aaron Levie on model selection, Harvey's Gabe Pereyra on building atop open-source and Bernstein's Stacey Rasgon on OpenAI's new Jalapeño chip and the inference-cost race hitting Nvidia and Broadcom.

articles.title: Butter and margarine look similar but their chemistry changes everything
articles.description: The battle between butter and margarine comes down to chemistry. Butter’s naturally occurring fats create rich flavors, golden browning, and flaky baked goods, while margarine’s modified plant oils offer consistency and a longer shelf life. Although both contain mostly fat, their different structures influence how they behave in recipes. Understanding those differences can help you choose the right one for cooking, baking, or health goals.

articles.title: Testing reveals popular weight loss peptide had double the strength on label
